title: Kit for safe deposit box and method of use
abstract: Kit for a private safe deposit box with: - container (1) suitable to contain a safe deposit box (2) in a compartment (1.1) with an electrical connector (1.2), to be installed at a business/store or a vehicle; - safe deposit box (2), provided with a first compartment (2.1) accessible through a first door (2.1') with mechanical lock and slot (2.1'') with curved section, through which a user inserts money; arranged on the bottom of the first compartment (2.1) being a second door (2.5') for access to the second compartment (2.5) in which the following are housed: o rechargeable battery (2.6); o inertial sensors (7) for detecting break-in attempts; o geolocation device (2.7); o CPU (2.9) for determining situations of danger and activating alarm signals such as: + acoustic signalling device (3); + smoke bomb (3.1); - blisters (4) with upper closure (4.1) for containing the banknotes and insert them through the slot (2.1'').
claims:
Claims Claims 1. Kit for a private safe deposit box, characterised in that it comprises at least: - one container (1) consisting of a parallelepiped-shaped metal structure with size comprised between 15 cm X 20 cm X 30 cm height and 150 cm X 200 cm X 300 cm height, provided with a compartment (1.1) suitable to contain a safe deposit box (2) in a stable and reversible manner by means of a common mechanical opening and closure lock mechanism (1.3-1.4); said container (1) being provided, in said compartment (1.1), with at least one electrical connector (1.2) suitable to be engaged with a corresponding electrical connector 2.2) of said safe deposit box (2); said container (1) being suitable to be installed in a fixed manner at a safe place of a business/store or of a vehicle for the transportation of goods of various type; - said safe deposit box (2), suitable to be reversibly inserted into the compartment (1.1) of said container (1) and to be reversibly coupled thereto by means of said lock mechanism (2.3-2.4); said deposit box (2) having weight comprised between 5 kg and 12 kg, preferably 7 kg; said safe deposit box (2) being provided, on the outer surface thereof, with said electrical connector (2.2) suitable to be engaged with said electrical connector (1.2) of said container (1) in order to power supply the electronic equipment contained therein; said safe deposit box (2) being provided with a first compartment (2.1) and with a second compartment (2.5) accessible in sequence; said first compartment (2.1) being suitable to contain valuables and being accessible by means of a first door (2.G) provided with mechanical lock and with at least one slot (2.1â) with curved section, through which a user inserts the money, preferably kept in special blisters (4), which falls into said first compartment (2.1); on the bottom of the latter, a second door (2.5â) being arranged, it too provided with mechanical lock, suitable to allow the access to said second compartment (2.5), preferably airtight, in which at least the following are housed: o a rechargeable battery (2.6), suitable to power supply all the electronic 

 equipment listed below even when said safe deposit box (2) is disconnected from said electrical connector (1.2) of said container (1); o a plurality of inertial sensors (7) suitable to detect possible attempts to break into the safe deposit box (2); o a geolocation sensor (2.7); suitable to detect, at each instant, the geographic coordinates of the safe deposit box (2); o a CPU control device (2.9) suitable to receive the data from said geolocation sensor (2.7) and from said inertial sensors (7) in order to determine possible danger situations, according to pre-set parameters, and consequently activate the alarm signals which comprise at least: the activation of an acoustic signal (3) arranged on said safe deposit box (2), suitable to emit a sound alarm that can be heard at a great distance in order to signal the thief; the activation of a smoke bomb (3.1) arranged on said safe deposit box (2), suitable to emit a predetermined amount of smoke in order to signal the thief and obstruct the escape thereof; a plurality of said blisters (4) suitable to contain a specific amount of money that a user inserts therein; said blisters (4) being provided with an upper closure (4.1) suitable to reversibly seal the content of said blister (4); each of said blisters (4) being flexible such that it can be inserted into the first compartment (2.1) of said safe deposit box (2) by passing through said curved slot (2.1â). 2. Kit for a private safe deposit box, according to the preceding claim 1, characterised in that said safe deposit box (2), in said first compartment (2.1), is provided with a money- counter device suitable to communicate, to said CPU (2.9), the total amount of money deposited in said first compartment (2.1); said CPU (2.9) being able to communicate said amount to a further electronic device connected thereto. 3. Kit for a private safe deposit box, according to any one of the preceding claims 1 or 2, characterised in that said safe deposit box (2), in the second compartment (2.5), is provided with a timer (2.8) suitable to be pre-set in order to establish the time span available to a user who is transporting a safe deposit box (2) that was previously disconnected from a container (1), in order to reconnect it to the same or to a further container (1); said CPU (2.9) being suitable to activate at least the acoustic signal (3)should said time span be exceeded. 4. Kit for a private safe deposit box, according to any one of the preceding claims, characterised in that said safe deposit box (2), in said first compartment (2.1) is provided with a staining device suitable to stain the valuables contained in the stolen safe deposit box (2) with ink, rendering them non-usable; said staining device being suitable to come into operation when said CPU (2.9) is in an alarm state for a time interval that exceeds a pre-set value. 5. Kit for a private safe deposit box, according to any one of the preceding claims, characterised in that said safe deposit box (2) is provided with a handle (5) suitable to be grasped by a user in order to facilitate the transportation thereof. 6. Kit for a private safe deposit box, according to any one of the preceding claims, characterised in that said safe deposit box (2) is provided with a further compartment, accessible by means of a common mechanical lock mechanism, suitable to be reversibly ballasted in order to weigh down the safe deposit box (2) during the transportation. 7. Kit for a private safe deposit box, according to the preceding claim 6, characterised in that said further compartment that can be ballasted is provided with common telescopic mechanisms suitable to be expanded when said further compartment is ballasted and suitable to allow the retraction of said further compartment into the initial shape when 

 empty. 8. Kit for a private safe deposit box, according to any one of the preceding claims, characterised in that by means of an external electronic device connected to said CPU (2 9), a user can adjust security parameters that regard at least: - a geographical area in which the safe deposit box (2) can be moved even when disconnected from the relative container (1); - the admissible time intervals for the movement of said safe deposit box (2) when disconnected from the relative container (1); - the hours within which it is allowed to disconnect the safe deposit box (2) from the relative container (1); the violation of at least one of the aforementioned security parameters being sufficient condition for the activation of the alarms by said CPU (2.9). 9. Kit for a private safe deposit box, according to any one of the preceding claims, characterised in that said mechanical lock mechanism between said container (1) and said safe deposit box (2) consists of at least one pair of projections (1.3) arranged on two opposite sides of the compartment (1.1) of said container (1); said projections (1.3) being provided with at least one fissure (1.4) suitable to be engaged with at least one corresponding lock bar (2.4) suitable to reversibly project from each recess (2.3) of at least one pair of recesses (2.3) arranged on the external sides of said safe deposit box (2) in a position corresponding to the projections (1.3) of the container (1). 10. Method for using the private safe deposit box in a business/store, according to the preceding claim, characterised in that it comprises the steps of: - installing a container (1) at a safe place of said business/store, preferably in proximity to the counter/cash register; - inserting the relative safe deposit box (2) and closing the lock (1.3-1.4; 2.3-2.4); 

 - possible insertion of the banknotes received as payment from customers into the special blisters (4) that have been provided and closing by means of said upper closure (4.1); - inserting the blisters (4) or the banknotes in the slot (2.1â) of the safe deposit box (2), with possible calculation of the amount introduced by means of said money- counter device; - opening the lock (1.3-1.4; 2.3-2.4), removing the safe deposit box (2) and handing the latter over to a user designated to transfer to a predetermined place where the money is kept; - possible insertion of the safe deposit box (2) into a further container (1) arranged in the vehicle designated for transportation; - possible monitoring of the route taken by said user by sharing the data detected by the geolocation sensor (2.7) using an electronic device connected to said CPU (2.9); - reaching the place designated for opening the safe deposit box (2) and possible insertion thereof into a further container (1) arranged at said place; - opening the first door (2.U) in order to access the contents of the first compartment (2.1) and remove the valuables; counting the money; communicating the amount to the business/store; - returning the safe deposit box (2) to the business/store. 11. Use of the kit for a private safe deposit box, according to any one of the preceding claims 1-9, wherein at least one container (1) is installed in the cabin or in the goods compartment of a road vehicle.
